targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  trade_date::date AS time,
  open AS open,
  high AS high,
  low AS low,
  close AS close,
  vol AS volume
FROM daily
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
  AND trade_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY trade_date

SELECT
  trade_date::date AS time,
  open AS open,
  high AS high,
  low AS low,
  close AS close,
  vol AS volume
FROM daily_qfq
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
  AND trade_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY trade_date

SELECT
  trade_date::date AS time,
  open AS open,
  high AS high,
  low AS low,
  close AS close,
  vol AS volume
FROM daily_hfq
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
  AND trade_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY trade_date

SELECT
  trade_date::date AS time,
  vol AS "Volume",
  CASE WHEN close >= open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "UpDay"
FROM daily
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
  AND trade_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY trade_date

SELECT comment_date::date AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Recommendations", STRING_AGG(analyst || ' @ ' || broker, '\n' ORDER BY analyst) AS "Analysts", STRING_AGG(CASE WHEN target_space IS NOT NULL AND target_space != '--' AND target_space != '' THEN target_space ELSE NULL END, ', ') AS "Target Spaces" FROM sohu_jlp WHERE ts_code = '${ts_code}' GROUP BY comment_date ORDER BY comment_date

SELECT trade_date::date AS time,
  pe_ttm AS "PE-TTM",
  pb AS "PB"
FROM daily_basic
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
  AND trade_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY trade_date

SELECT trade_date::date AS time,
  turnover_rate_f AS "Turnover Rate",
  dv_ttm AS "Dividend Yield"
FROM daily_basic
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
  AND trade_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY trade_date

SELECT close AS "Latest Close"
FROM daily
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
ORDER BY trade_date DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT pct_chg AS "Daily Change"
FROM daily
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
ORDER BY trade_date DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT vol AS "Volume"
FROM daily
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
ORDER BY trade_date DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT amount AS "Amount"
FROM daily
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
ORDER BY trade_date DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT pe_ttm AS "PE-TTM"
FROM daily_basic
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
ORDER BY trade_date DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT pb AS "PB"
FROM daily_basic
WHERE ts_code='$ts_code'
ORDER BY trade_date DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT trade_date::date AS time, count(*) AS row_count
FROM daily
GROUP BY trade_date
ORDER BY trade_date

panels.title: Daily Data Row Count by Trade Date

targets.rawSql:
SELECT industry, count(*) AS count
FROM stock_basic
WHERE industry IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY industry
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20
SELECT max(trade_date) AS latest_date FROM daily

SELECT table_name, rule_name, checked_at, total_rows, issue_count AS failed_rows,
  CASE WHEN total_rows > 0 THEN round(issue_count::numeric / total_rows, 4) ELSE 0 END AS fail_rate,
  status
FROM data_quality_log
ORDER BY checked_at DESC
LIMIT 20
SELECT end_date::date AS time, eps AS "EPS", bps AS "BPS", ocfps AS "OCFPS", cfps AS "CFPS" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time

panels.title: EPS / BPS / Cash Flow Per Share

targets.rawSql: SELECT end_date::date AS time, ebit AS "EBIT", ebitda AS "EBITDA", fcff AS "FCFF", fcfe AS "FCFE" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time
SELECT end_date::date AS time, roe AS "ROE", roe_waa AS "ROE_WAA", roa AS "ROA", roic AS "ROIC" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time

SELECT end_date::date AS time, grossprofit_margin AS "Gross Margin", netprofit_margin AS "Net Margin", profit_to_gr AS "Profit/GR", op_of_gr AS "Op/GR" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time
SELECT end_date::date AS time, current_ratio AS "Current Ratio", quick_ratio AS "Quick Ratio", cash_ratio AS "Cash Ratio" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time

SELECT end_date::date AS time, debt_to_assets AS "Debt/Assets", assets_to_eqt AS "Assets/Eqt", debt_to_eqt AS "Debt/Eqt", ebit_to_interest AS "EBIT/Interest" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time

SELECT end_date::date AS time, netprofit_yoy AS "Net Profit YoY", or_yoy AS "Revenue YoY", basic_eps_yoy AS "EPS YoY", assets_yoy AS "Assets YoY" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time
SELECT end_date::date AS time, ocf_yoy AS "OCF YoY", roe_yoy AS "ROE YoY", equity_yoy AS "Equity YoY" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time

SELECT end_date::date AS time, assets_turn AS "Assets Turnover", ar_turn AS "AR Turnover", inv_turn AS "Inv Turnover", ca_turn AS "CA Turnover", fa_turn AS "FA Turnover" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time
SELECT end_date::date AS time, rd_exp AS "R&D Expense" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' AND rd_exp IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time
SELECT end_date::date AS time, turn_days AS "Turnover Days" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' AND turn_days IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time

SELECT end_date::date AS time, q_roe AS "Q_ROE", q_netprofit_margin AS "Q_Net Margin", q_gsprofit_margin AS "Q_Gross Margin", q_op_to_gr AS "Q_Op/GR", q_gc_to_gr AS "Q_GC/GR" FROM fina_indicator WHERE ts_code='${ts_code}' ORDER BY time

list.definition: SELECT ts_code FROM stock_basic WHERE list_status='L' ORDER BY ts_code LIMIT 1000
list.label: Stock Code
list.name: ts_code
list.query: SELECT ts_code FROM stock_basic WHERE list_status='L' ORDER BY ts_code LIMIT 1000
